option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
# payment-ingest-spring - application configuration # # All S3 and Postgres settings live here so this service can be pointed at # any bucket/database without code changes. Override any of these via # environment variables (Spring relaxed binding, e.g. PAYMENT_INGEST_S3_BUCKET, # SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL) or a profile-specific application-<profile>.properties.
spring.application.name=payment-ingest-spring
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Payment source ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # "s3" (default) polls the S3 bucket configured below. # "filesystem" watches a local directory instead - no AWS/S3 dependency, # useful for running/demoing the service locally against just Postgres. payment-ingest.source=s3
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Postgres datasource ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ spring.datasource.url=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/payments spring.datasource.username=postgres spring.datasource.password=postgres spring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.postgresql.Driver
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Liquibase ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Default changelog location Spring Boot looks for - explicit here for clarity. spring.liquibase.change-log=classpath:db/changelog/db.changelog-master.xml spring.liquibase.enabled=true
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ S3 polling ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Bucket to poll for new payment XML files. payment-ingest.s3.bucket=CHANGE_ME_payment-files-bucket # AWS region for the S3 client. payment-ingest.s3.region=us-west-2 # Key prefix under which pacs.008 files are dropped. payment-ingest.s3.payments-prefix=payments/ # Key prefix for optional reference data (bic_directory.json, watchlist.json, # closed_accounts.json). Leave blank to disable those specific error checks. payment-ingest.s3.reference-data-prefix=reference/ # How often (ms) to poll the bucket for new files. payment-ingest.s3.poll-interval-ms=15000 # Optional: point the S3 client at a custom endpoint (e.g. LocalStack/MinIO) # for local development. Leave blank to use real AWS S3. payment-ingest.s3.endpoint-override=
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Local-filesystem polling (only used when payment-ingest.source=filesystem) ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Root directory to watch. Under it, pacs.008 *.xml files go in # <watch-dir>/payments/ and optional reference-data JSON files # (bic_directory.json, watchlist.json, closed_accounts.json) go in # <watch-dir>/reference/. payment-ingest.filesystem.watch-dir=C:/Users/u727254/Desktop/VISTA - hack/payment-drop payment-ingest.filesystem.payments-subdir=payments payment-ingest.filesystem.reference-data-subdir=reference payment-ingest.filesystem.poll-interval-ms=5000
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Error-resolution agent (Claude Sonnet via AWS Bedrock) ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Knowledge base (detection + suggested_action per error code, given as # reference context to the model). Bundled copy is used by default; point # this at an external file:... path to override without a rebuild, e.g.: # payment-ingest.error-agent.knowledge-base-path=file:C:/Users/u727254/Desktop/VISTA - hack/error-list/agent_error_knowledge.yaml payment-ingest.error-agent.knowledge-base-path=classpath:error-knowledge/agent_error_knowledge.yaml # System prompt for the resolution agent. payment-ingest.error-agent.system-prompt-path=classpath:prompts/error_resolution_system_prompt.md # Bedrock model id (or region-prefixed inference profile id) for Claude Sonnet. payment-ingest.error-agent.model-id=anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6-v1:0 # AWS region for the Bedrock Runtime client. payment-ingest.error-agent.bedrock-region=us-west-2 payment-ingest.error-agent.max-tokens=1024 payment-ingest.error-agent.temperature=0.1 # Where the agent appends its suggested-resolution write-up for each payment # that has one or more detected errors. Swap the ResolutionSink bean to # route this elsewhere later (queue, API, DB table) instead of a file. payment-ingest.error-agent.resolution-log-path=logs/error_resolution.log
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Logging ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ logging.level.com.payinvestigator.ingest=INFO

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# payment-ingest-spring - application configuration # # All S3 and Postgres settings live here so this service can be pointed at # any bucket/database without code changes. Override any of these via # environment variables (Spring relaxed binding, e.g. PAYMENT_INGEST_S3_BUCKET, # SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL) or a profile-specific application-<profile>.properties.
spring.application.name=payment-ingest-spring
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Payment source ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # "s3" (default) polls the S3 bucket configured below. # "filesystem" watches a local directory instead - no AWS/S3 dependency, # useful for running/demoing the service locally against just Postgres. payment-ingest.source=filesystem
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Postgres datasource ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ spring.datasource.url=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/payments spring.datasource.username=postgres spring.datasource.password=postgres spring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.postgresql.Driver
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Liquibase ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Default changelog location Spring Boot looks for - explicit here for clarity. spring.liquibase.change-log=classpath:db/changelog/db.changelog-master.xml spring.liquibase.enabled=true
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ S3 polling ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Bucket to poll for new payment XML files. payment-ingest.s3.bucket=CHANGE_ME_payment-files-bucket # AWS region for the S3 client. payment-ingest.s3.region=us-west-2 # Key prefix under which pacs.008 files are dropped. payment-ingest.s3.payments-prefix=payments/ # Key prefix for optional reference data (bic_directory.json, watchlist.json, # closed_accounts.json). Leave blank to disable those specific error checks. payment-ingest.s3.reference-data-prefix=reference/ # How often (ms) to poll the bucket for new files. payment-ingest.s3.poll-interval-ms=15000 # Optional: point the S3 client at a custom endpoint (e.g. LocalStack/MinIO) # for local development. Leave blank to use real AWS S3. payment-ingest.s3.endpoint-override=
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Local-filesystem polling (only used when payment-ingest.source=filesystem) ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Root directory to watch. Under it, pacs.008 *.xml files go in # <watch-dir>/payments/ and optional reference-data JSON files # (bic_directory.json, watchlist.json, closed_accounts.json) go in # <watch-dir>/reference/. payment-ingest.filesystem.watch-dir=C:/Users/u727254/IdeaProjects/vista-hackathon-26_A/local-payment-drop payment-ingest.filesystem.payments-subdir=payments payment-ingest.filesystem.reference-data-subdir=reference payment-ingest.filesystem.poll-interval-ms=5000
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Error-resolution agent (Claude Sonnet via AWS Bedrock) ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ # Knowledge base (detection + suggested_action per error code, given as # reference context to the model). Bundled copy is used by default; point # this at an external file:... path to override without a rebuild, e.g.: # payment-ingest.error-agent.knowledge-base-path=file:C:/Users/u727254/Desktop/VISTA - hack/error-list/agent_error_knowledge.yaml payment-ingest.error-agent.knowledge-base-path=classpath:error-knowledge/agent_error_knowledge.yaml # System prompt for the resolution agent. payment-ingest.error-agent.system-prompt-path=classpath:prompts/error_resolution_system_prompt.md # Bedrock model id (or region-prefixed inference profile id) for Claude Sonnet. payment-ingest.error-agent.model-id=anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6-v1:0 # AWS region for the Bedrock Runtime client. payment-ingest.error-agent.bedrock-region=us-west-2 payment-ingest.error-agent.max-tokens=1024 payment-ingest.error-agent.temperature=0.1 # Where the agent appends its suggested-resolution write-up for each payment # that has one or more detected errors. Swap the ResolutionSink bean to # route this elsewhere later (queue, API, DB table) instead of a file. payment-ingest.error-agent.resolution-log-path=logs/error_resolution.log
# ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ Logging ГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂГўВ”ВЂ logging.level.com.payinvestigator.ingest=INFO
